	{"bbox_2d": [358, 752, 922, 763], "text_content": "The STUSB4500 is a USB power delivery controller that addresses sink up to 100 W"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 767, 915, 779], "text_content": "(20 V; 5 A). It implements a proprietary algorithm to allow the negotiation of a power"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 782, 913, 795], "text_content": "delivery contract with a source without MCU support (auto-run mode). PDO profiles"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 797, 656, 809], "text_content": "are configured in an integrated non-volatile memory."},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 810, 917, 823], "text_content": "The device supports dead battery mode and is suited for sink devices powered from"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 825, 915, 838], "text_content": "dead battery state and requiring high power charging profile to be fully operational."},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 838, 913, 851], "text_content": "Thanks to its 20 V technology, it implements high voltage features to protect the CC"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 853, 891, 866], "text_content": "pins against short-circuits to VBUS up to 22 V and to support high voltage on the"},
	{"bbox_2d": [358, 868, 783, 881], "text_content": "VBUS pins directly connected to the VBUS power path up to 28 V."},
